objectives: Implement 5 new Rule trait implementations for extended ISO 20022 validation
Register all new rules in RuleRegistry::with_defaults()
Create parse->validate integration test using pacs.008 fixture
Update CLI validate command to scan new field types
constraints: No external date library — structural validation only
No hand-editing of generated/ model files
important_facts: LEI MOD 97-10: expand full 20-char string to numeric (no rearrangement, unlike IBAN)
LEI check digit derivation: 98 - (numeric(prefix+'00') mod 97), result zero-padded to 2 digits
pacs_008_001_13_minimal.xml was missing required ChrgBr field — fixed by adding <ChrgBr>SLEV</ChrgBr>
ChoiceWrapper<T> used in model: access enum via .inner field
AmountFormatRule uses f64::parse for zero-check only after structural validation
decisions_made: LEI: no rearrangement in mod-97 unlike IBAN — ISO 17442 treats full string directly
datetime.rs: structural only (year 1900-2099, month 01-12, day 01-31) — no calendar awareness, matches ISO 20022 schema behavior
Currency/Country: static &[&str] slice with binary search via Contains, not HashSet — simpler, adequate at these sizes
Integration test: reads testdata from workspace root via CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR/../..
CLI: attribute extraction handled separately from element extraction (new extract_all_attributes fn)
risks_issues: ZZZ is not in ISO 4217 set (correct — ZZZ is not a valid ISO 4217 code; XTS and XXX are reserved testing codes and ARE included)
f64 parsing for amount zero-check: safe since structural pre-validation ensures the string is well-formed before parse

iteration.summary: Implemented 6 new validation rule modules for mx20022-validate: CurrencyRule (ISO 4217, ~164 codes), CountryCodeRule (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, 250 codes), LeiRule (ISO 17442, MOD 97-10 on full 20-char string), AmountFormatRule (positive decimal, max 18 int / 5 frac digits), IsoDateTimeRule and IsoDateRule (structural ISO 8601). Updated mod.rs to register all 8 rules in with_defaults(). Created 15-test integration test that deserializes a pacs.008 fixture and validates extracted fields. Updated CLI validate command to check Ccy attributes/elements, LEI, CreDtTm, and IntrBkSttlmDt. Fixed a bug in the pacs.008 test fixture (missing required ChrgBr field). Fixed a clippy lint (as u16 -> u16::from). All 133 tests pass and all quality gates clear.
outputs_produced: Updated: rules/mod.rs, validate/Cargo.toml, cli validate.rs, test fixture
